mapper.select: SELECT id AS messageId, session_id AS sessionId, role, content, from_cache AS fromCache, can_create_ticket AS canCreateTicket, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = 0
